/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/motion_with_control_external_control_loop.dir/motion_with_control_external_control_loop.cpp.o -o motion_with_control_external_control_loop  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dharmik.p45/Dharmik/berry_ws/build/libfranka: libexamples_common.a ../libfranka.so.0.20.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libPocoFoundation.so.80 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcre.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lpthread -ldl -lrt
